title: Diagnostic criteria for obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD)
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — obsessions, compulsions, and OCD diagnostic criteria.
learningObjectives: Define obsessions and compulsions with examples.
Evaluate validity and insight levels in OCD.

simpleExplanation.title: Trapped in loops
simpleExplanation.summary: OCD involves intrusive thoughts (obsessions) and repetitive behaviours (compulsions) performed to reduce anxiety — both must cause significant distress.
steps: Insight — patient knows thoughts are excessive.

sections.content: **OCD diagnosis** (1.5.1) — give **clear examples** of obsessions vs compulsions.
